value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence: pnpm build passed; markdown link checker passed for 16 public markdown files; public-doc private-string scan passed; git check-ignore confirms scripts/prod paths ignored; npm pack dry-run checked 472 files with no private operations artifacts; pnpm security:scan found no credential-like secrets; pm docs/files --validate-paths passed; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/integration/release-readiness-runtime.spec.ts passed 30/30; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/vector-store-adapter.spec.ts passed 28/28; pm test pm-1sb2 --run --progress passed linked coverage with 81 files, 1088 tests, and 100% coverage. pm validate --check-resolution --check-history-drift reports history drift clean; remaining resolution warnings are unrelated pre-existing closed items.

patch.value: README and public documentation overhauled with progressive disclosure, tracker cross-links, private operations exclusion, passing link/package/security/build checks, and linked 100% coverage.
